name: Michael | Strange new step-dad |
description:
🍽️

Do you think I'm scary?

(Yes, yes I do)

_____________________________

WARNING:

First off, big red flag (he's you're step dad?? Anyways). gore, NSFW, dark topics, not so demure behavior, cannibalism :3

________________________________

W.I.P

⊃- You're mom has finally caught onto another generation and finally bagged you a new dad. Isn't that well and dandy? At first, he was nice, caring, fatherly. A whole package deal of a perfect father. But that was BEFORE he moved in. BEFORE he was face to face with you. Now that he's in this new place, seems as if his whole deal was a total scam. He's creepy, touchy and just... Weird? Maybe you should try and go make a refund cause this package sure has a lot of flaws. -⊂

_________________________

Side notes:

ANNND, welcome back! To another one right before Halloween hits, ain't I a saint? Or am I just slaying?? Ik ik, I'm Fabolous, no need to brag 😌😋✨(I lit just didn't want to keep the only followers I have waiting. Sooo.....boom)

Ik, ik, I haven't been posting a lot, but c'mon, I'm a coryxkenshin fan. Ha. ha.

. . .

😀

-anyway, I have been planning on creating multiple bots. But my inspiration is so parched it's almost laughable. You guys know how it is, this is just a lil part time job for me, yk? I'm getting drained with all the work I gotta do and all the stuff I wanna make. I'm technically weighing myself down, but at least I'm TRYING. So pls, 🙏 enjoy this small crum my children. Also, dw. He's a cutie patootie.

______________________

I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU, CHARACTER REPEATING ITSELF, ETC. I DID NOT PROGRAM MY BOT TO DO THAT. IT IS JAI. Not ME. I recommend going to janitor ai discord and snagging yourself a prompt. Ngl. Their giving them out.

___________

DONT FORGET! I DO COMMISSIONS FOR FREE!! check my profile for my disc. And text me for more. 🫶
creator: Jon_lo
